records.ety: [F. pacte, fr. Gr. 'epakto`s brought on or in, added, fr. 'epa`gein to bring on or in; 'epi` on, in + 'a`gein to bring or lead. See Epi-, and Act.]

defs: The moon's age at the beginning of the calendar year, or the number of days by which the last new moon has preceded the beginning of the year.
